name: Gloria Moss Old Fashioned Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a deep 9-inch pie plate with pastry. Flute the edges and brush the bottom of the pastry with beaten egg. Refrigerate.
2. To prepare the filling, combine sugar, salt, flour, cinnamon, ginger, cloves, allspice, and nutmeg in a bowl.
3. Stir in the beaten eggs.
4. Combine the pumpkin (2 cups) and milk. Add this mixture to the dry ingredients, stirring until well combined.
5. Chill the filling thoroughly.
6. Pour brandy or rum into the filling; pour it into the pie shell.
7. Bake at 450 degrees F for 10 minutes. Lower the heat setting to 400 degrees F and bake for an additional half hour.
